title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 295.050 - Duties of chairman
text:
295.050.  Duties of chairman. — The chairman of the board shall devote his full time to his duties and shall have charge of the office of the board.  He shall keep all records of the proceedings of the board, and shall supervise the work of the employees of the board, and shall have such other powers and duties as may be conferred, or imposed upon him by the board.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 358 § 5)
